businessSummary.oneLiner: Southeast Asia's largest e-commerce (Shopee), digital entertainment (Garena/Free Fire), and fintech (Monee) operator — Singapore-based global internet company
businessSummary.description: Sea Limited is a Singapore-headquartered global technology company. Q4 2025 revenue $6.85B (+38.4% YoY), net income $397M, EPS $0.63. FY2025 revenue $22.94B (+36.4%). Monday close $90.10 (-2.04%). Stabilization attempt after -26% post-earnings plunge (3/3), but selling pressure persists. Forward P/E 21.53x, PEG 0.03.
howTheyMakeMoney: E-commerce (Shopee): #1 Southeast Asian e-commerce platform. GMV-based commissions and advertising. Q4 revenue +35.8%
Digital Financial Services (Monee/SeaMoney): Digital payments, lending, insurance. Q4 revenue +56.4%
Digital Entertainment (Garena): Free Fire and other game publishing. Q4 revenue +32.8%

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on EPS $2.58. Reasonable given 36% growth rate

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026E EPS $4.18. Cheap for a growth stock

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Profitability improving but Shopee margin pressure

keyMetrics.name: Loan Book
keyMetrics.interpretation: Monee fintech explosive growth. NPL 1.1% healthy

keyMetrics.name: PEG
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extreme undervaluation relative to growth. Post-earnings overreaction reflected

growthDrivers.title: Post-Earnings Oversold — RSI Recovery Attempt
growthDrivers.description: Stock plunged -26% after 3/3 earnings on Shopee margin guidance disappointment. RSI bouncing from oversold levels. Selling pressure exhaustion signs emerging.

growthDrivers.title: Google Partnership — AI Agent Shopping Prototype
growthDrivers.description: Strategic partnership with Google signed. Co-developing AI agent shopping prototype for Shopee. AI tools for Garena gaming also planned.

growthDrivers.title: Monee Fintech Acceleration — Loan Book $9.2B (+80%)
growthDrivers.description: AI-powered underwriting expanding lending addressable market. 37M active credit users, NPL 1.1% healthy. Fintech growth engine.

growthDrivers.title: All Analysts Buy — Average Target $179.54 (+99%)
growthDrivers.description: 10 of 11 analysts rate Buy. Average target 2x current price. Consensus that market overreacted to earnings shock.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 52% Southeast Asian e-commerce market share (Shopee), fintech-e-commerce-gaming ecosystem synergy, and $10.57B net cash as the core moat.

moats.description: Shopee holds 52% market share. Logistics (Shopee Express) vertically integrated.
Monee (SeaMoney) provides payment/lending services to Shopee users. Cross-sell maximization.
Globally popular game provides stable cash flow. Funds e-commerce investment.

competitors.name: Grab Holdings
competitors.detail: Southeast Asian super-app. Mobility + fintech competition

competitors.name: TikTok Shop
competitors.detail: Rapidly growing social commerce. Threatening Shopee market share in Southeast Asia

competitors.name: MercadoLibre
competitors.detail: Latin American e-commerce. Competing with Shopee's Brazil expansion

recentNews.headline: SE $90.10 (-2.04%) — Declining with macro selloff
recentNews.significance: 8th trading day of stabilization attempt after earnings shock. Testing $88 support

recentNews.headline: StocksToTrade: 'Record Q4 earnings despite stock tumbler, +7.58% rebound'
recentNews.significance: Technical rebound from oversold. Analysts maintaining Buy

recentNews.headline: SE -18% — Record 2025 results but soft Shopee margin outlook
recentNews.significance: FY2025 all-time highs but flat 2026 EBITDA guidance triggered sell-off

recentNews.headline: Q4 2025 earnings — Revenue $6.85B (+38.4%), net income $397M
recentNews.significance: All-time record quarterly revenue. But Shopee margin guidance triggered plunge

recentNews.headline: Google-Sea AI partnership — AI agent shopping prototype development
recentNews.significance: AI strategy strengthening. Long-term growth catalyst

analystOpinions.notableComment: Barclays $226→$120 was the only major negative adjustment. Bernstein $170→$150. All maintain Buy or higher. Average target is 2x current price.

risks.title: Shopee Margin Guidance Disappointment
risks.description: 2026 Shopee EBITDA guidance flat. Competition intensifying (TikTok Shop) raising marketing costs.

risks.title: TikTok Shop Competition Threat
risks.description: Rapidly growing social commerce eroding Southeast Asian market share. Weakness in live commerce.

risks.title: Currency Risk
risks.description: Southeast Asian currency weakness reduces USD-denominated revenue. Indonesian Rupiah dependency.

risks.title: Regulatory Risk
risks.description: Potential e-commerce/fintech regulation tightening in key markets like Indonesia.

risks.title: Gaming Segment Volatility
risks.description: Free Fire revenue dependent on game lifecycle. New title failure risks cash flow reduction.

buyReasons.title: Forward P/E 21.5x — Extreme Undervaluation for Growth
buyReasons.rationale: FY2026E revenue +25%, EPS +66% growth expectations vs Forward P/E 21.5x. PEG 0.03.

buyReasons.title: All Analysts Buy — Average Target $179.54 (+99%)
buyReasons.rationale: 10 of 11 Buy, 1 Hold. Consensus: market overreacted to earnings shock.

buyReasons.title: Net Cash $10.57B — 20% of Market Cap
buyReasons.rationale: Zero debt, abundant cash. Shareholder return or M&A optionality.

buyReasons.title: Monee Fintech Explosive Growth
buyReasons.rationale: Loan book $9.2B (+80% YoY), NPL 1.1%. Emerging as Southeast Asian fintech leader.

overallOpinion: Record quarterly results but Shopee margin guidance disappointment drove a -26% plunge, now stabilizing around $90.10. Forward P/E 21.5x, net cash $10.57B (20% of market cap), and analyst average target $179.54 (+99%) all point to extreme undervaluation relative to fundamentals. However, Shopee margin pressure, TikTok Shop competition, and trading below 50-day/200-day SMAs represent near-term risks. Google AI partnership and Monee fintech growth (+80%) are medium-term catalysts. Contrarian oversold buying opportunity, but safer to enter after $88 support confirmation.
